interface.longDescription: FareHarbor helps people easily discover and book tours and activities around the world. Our app connects travelers with trusted local operators, making it simple to explore experiences like sightseeing tours, outdoor adventures, cultural activities, and attractions in one place. With up-to-date availability, clear options, and a seamless booking experience, FareHarbor takes the friction out of planning memorable experiences, whether you’re traveling or booking locally.
defaultPrompt: I'm looking for tours in the mountains
